title: Resinous Hangover-Cure Portuguese Bacon Hash
description: A rich, comforting, and hangover-curing Portuguese-inspired breakfast dish featuring crispy bacon lardons and a creamy coconut sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and saut49 until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the bacon lardons and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the canned sweet potatoes to the skillet and stir to coat with oil and combine with onion and garlic.
Pour in the canned coconut milk and stir to combine with sweet potatoes and onion mixture.
Add the seltzer water to the skillet and stir to combine, allowing the mixture to sizzle and thicken.
Stir in the chopped cilantro, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Return the bacon lardons to the skillet and stir to combine.
Squeeze in the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
